{\n72\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n73\t\n74\t    // Query the first node in each replica group for index list\n75\t    let results: Vec<serde_json::Value> = Vec::new();\n76\t\n77\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n78\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n79\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n80\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n81\t                path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n82\t                body: vec![],\n83\t                headers: vec![],\n84\t            };\n85\t\n86\t            let scatter =\n87\t                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n88\t\n89\t            let result = scatter\n90\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n91\t                .await\n92\t                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n93\t\n94\t            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n95\t                if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n96\t                    if let Some(arr) = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n97\t                        // Return results from first successful group\n98\t                        return Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": arr })));\n99\t                    }\n100\t                }\n101\t            }\n102\t        }\n103\t    }\n104\t\n105\t    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": results })))\n106\t}\n107\t\n108\t/// POST /indexes - Create a new index.\n109\tasync fn create_index(\n110\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n111\t    req: Json<CreateIndexRequest>,\n112\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n113\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n114\t\n115\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (use shard 0 as representative)\n116\t    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n117\t\n118\t    if targets.is_empty() {\n119\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n120\t    }\n121\t\n122\t    // Build request with _miroir_shard injected into filterableAttributes\n123\t    let mut create_req = serde_json::json!({\n124\t        \"uid\": req.uid,\n125\t        \"primaryKey\": req.primary_key,\n126\t    });\n127\t\n128\t    // Inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes if _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n132\t    }\n133\t\n134\t    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&create_req).unwrap_or_default();\n135\t\n136\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n137\t        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n138\t        path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n139\t        body: body_bytes,\n140\t        headers: vec![],\n141\t    };\n142\t\n143\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n144\t    let result = scatter\n145\t        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n146\t        .await\n147\t        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n148\t\n149\t    // Check if creation succeeded on quorum\n150\t    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n151\t    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n152\t\n153\t    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n154\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\n155\t            \"Failed to create index on quorum of nodes\",\n156\t        ));\n157\t    }\n158\t\n159\t    // Return first response\n160\t    let resp = result\n161\t        .responses\n162\t        .first()\n163\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n164\t\n165\t    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n166\t\n167\t    // After index creation, we need to update settings to inject _miroir_shard\n168\t    // This is done in a follow-up request\n169\t    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n170\t        .unwrap_or_else(|_| serde_json::json!({}));\n171\t\n172\t    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n173\t}\n174\t\n175\t/// GET /indexes/:index - Get index metadata.\n176\tasync fn get_index(\n177\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n178\t    Path(index): topology.groups() {\n184\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n185\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n186\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n187\t HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n194\t\n195\t            let result = scatter\n196\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n197\t                .await\n198\t                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n199\t\n200\t            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n201\t                let status = resp.status;\n202\t                if status == 200 {\n203\t                    if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n204\t                        return Ok(Json(json));\n205\t                    }\n206\t                } else if status == 404 {\n207\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n208\t                }\n209\t            }\n210\t        }\n211\t    }\n212\t\n213\t    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n214\t}\n215\t\n216\t/// DELETE /indexes/:index - Delete an index.\n217\tasync fn delete_index(\n218\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n219\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n220\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n221\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n222\t\n223\t    // Broadcast to all nodes\n224\t    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n225\t\n226\t    if targets.is_empty() {\n227\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n228\t    }\n229\t\n230\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n231\t        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n232\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n233\t        body: vec![],\n234\t        headers: vec![],\n235\t    };\n236\t\n237\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n238\t    let result = scatter\n239\t        .scatter(&topology, targets, request,            \"Failed to delete index on quorum of nodes\",\n250\t        ));\n251\t    }\n252\t\n253\t    // Return first response\n254\t    let resp = result\n255\t        .responses\n256\t        .first()\n257\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n258\t\n259\t    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n260\t\n261\t    Ok((status, Json(resp.body.clone())).into_response())\n262\t}\n263\t\n264\t/// GET /indexes/:index/stats - Get index statistics.\n265\tasync fn get_index_stats(\n266\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n267\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n268\t) -> Result<Json<IndexStatsResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n269\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n270\t\n271\t    let mut total_documents = 0u64;\n272\t    let mut is_indexing = false;\n273\t    let mut field_distributions: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n274\t\n275\t    // Aggregate stats from all replica groups\n276\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n277\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n278\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n279\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n280\t                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/stats\", index),\n281\t                body: vec![],\n282\t                headers: vec![],\n283\t            };\n284\t\n285\t            let scatter =\n286\t                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n287\t\n288\t            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n289\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n290\t                .await\n291\t            {\n292\t                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n293\t                    if resp.status == 200 {\n294\t                        // Parse response body as JSON\n295\t                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n296\t                            // Extract stats\n297\t                            if let Some(docs) = json.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n298\t                            {\n299\t                                // Use max document count across replicas (more accurate)\n300\t                                total_documents = total_documents.max(docs);\n301\t                            }\n302\t\n303\t                            if let Some(indexing) = json.get(\"isIndexing\").and_then(|v| v.as_bool()) {\n304\t                                is_indexing = is_indexing || indexing;\n305\t                            }\n306\t\n307\t                            if let Some(fields) = json.get(\"fieldDistribution\") {\n308\t                                field_distributions.push(fields.clone());\n309\t                            }\n310\t                        }\n311\t                    }\n312\t                }\n313\t            }\n314\t        }\n315\t    }\n316\t\n317\t    // Merge field distributions\n318\t    let merged_fields = merge_field_distributions(field_distributions);\n319\t\n320\t    Ok(Json(IndexStatsResponse {\n321\t        number_of_documents: total_documents,\n322\t        is_indexing,\n323\t        field_distribution: merged_fields,\n324\t    }))\n325\t}\n326\t\n327\t/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get index settings.\n328\tasync fn get_settings(\n329\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n330\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n331\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n332\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n333\t\n334\t    // Query the first available node\n335\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n336\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n337\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n338\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n339\t                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n340\t                body: vec![],\n341\t                headers: vec![],\n342\t            };\n343\t\n344\t            let scatter =\n345\t                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n346\t\n347\t            let result = scatter\n348\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n349\t                .await\n350\t                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n351\t\n352\t            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n353\t                let status = resp.status;\n354\t                if status == 200 {\n355\t                    return Ok(Json(resp.body.clone().into()));\n356\t                } else if status == 404 {\n357\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n358\t                }\n359\t            }\n360\t        }\n361\t    }\n362\t\n363\t    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n364\t}\n365\t\n366\t/// Merge field distributions from multiple nodes.\n367\tfn merge_field_distributions(distributions: Vec<Value>) -> Value {\n368\t    use std::collections::HashMap;\n369\t\n370\t    let mut merged: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, u64>> = HashMap::new();\n371\t\n372\t    for dist in distributions {\n373\t        if let Some(obj) = dist.as_object() {\n374\t            for (field, value) in obj {\n375\t                if let Some(inner) = value.as_object() {\n376\t                    let entry = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n377\t                    for (k, v) in inner {\n378\t                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n379\t    .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(list_indexes).post(create_index))\n        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::get(get_index).delete(delete_index))\n        .route(\"/:index/stats\", topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query the first node in each replica group for index list\n    let results: Vec<serde_json::Value> = Vec::new();\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if let Ok(json) = successful group\n                        return Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": arr })));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": results })))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes - Create a new index.\nasync fn create_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    req: Json<CreateIndexRequest>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Broadcast to all nodes (use shard 0 as representative)\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    // Build request with _miroir_shard injected into filterableAttributes\n    let mut create_req = serde_json::json!({\n        \"uid\": req.uid,\n        \"primaryKey\": req.primary_key,\n    });\n\n    // Inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes if settings are present\n    if let Some(_obj) = create_req.as_object_mut() {\n        // For index creation, we'll need to update settings after creation\n        // to inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n    }\n\n .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if creation succeeded on quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\n            \"Failed to create index on quorum of nodes\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Return first response\n    let resp = result\n        .responses\n        .first()\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n\n    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n\n    // After index creation, we need to update settings to inject _miroir_shard\n    // This is done in a follow-up request\n    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n        .unwrap_or_else(|_| .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if deletion succeeded on quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = statistics.\nasync fn get_index_stats(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<IndexStatsResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let mut total_documents = 0u64;\n    let mut is_indexing = false;\n    let mut field_distributions: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n\n    // Aggregate stats from all replica groups\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/stats\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        // Parse response body as JSON\n                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                            // Extract stats\n                            if let Some(docs) = json.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n                            {\n                                // Use max document count across replicas (more accurate)\n                                total_documents = total_documents.max(docs);\n                            }\n\n                            if let Some(indexing) = json.get(\"isIndexing\").and_then(|v|       }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Merge field distributions\n    let merged_fields = merge_field_distributions(field_distributions);\n\n    Ok(Json(IndexStatsResponse {\n multiple nodes.\nfn merge_field_distributions(distributions: Vec<Value>) -> Value {\n    use std::collections::HashMap;\n\n    let mut merged: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, u64>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for dist in distributions {\n        if let Some(obj) = dist.as_object() {\n            for (field, value) in obj {\n                if let Some(inner) = value.as_object() {\n                    let entry = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n                    for (k, v) in inner {\n                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n                            *entry.entry(k.clone()).or_insert(0) += count;\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Convert back to JSON\n    let mut result Search route: POST /indexes/:index/search\n//!\n//! Implements the read path per plan §2:\n//! - Pick group via query_seq % RG\n//! - Build intra-group covering set\n//! - Scatter search to covering set nodes\n//! - Merge by _rankingScore\n//! - Strip \"camelCase\")]\nstruct SearchRequest {\n    q: Option<String>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    offset: Option<usize>,\n    filter: Option<serde_json::Value>,\n    sort: Option<Vec<String>>,\n specific replica group.\n///\n/// Returns (shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids)\nasync fn search_with_group(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    group_id: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    req_body: &[u8],\n    query_seq: u64,\n    limit: usize,\n    offset: usize,\n    client_requested_score: bool,\n    facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n) -> Result<(Vec<CoreShardResponse>, bool, Vec<u32>), ErrorResponse> {\n    let group = topology\n        .group(group_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\"Group {} not found\", group_id)))?;\n\n    // Build covering set for all shards\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n    let covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/search\", index),\n        body: req_body.to_vec(),\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    // Scatter search to all nodes in covering set\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(topology, covering.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Build shard responses for merger\n    let mut shard_responses: Vec<CoreShardResponse> = Vec::new();\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut failed_shard_ids: Vec<u32> = Vec::new();\n\n    // Group responses by node\n    let mut responses_by_node: std::collections::HashMap<String, serde_json::Value> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for resp in result.responses {\n        let node_id = resp.node_id.as_str().to_string();\n        responses_by_node.insert(node_id, resp.body.into());\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, find the response from its assigned node\n    for (shard_id, node_id) in covering.iter().enumerate() {\n        let node_id_str = node_id.as_str().to_string();\n\n        if let Some(body) = responses_by_node.get(&node_id_str) {\n            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n                body: body.clone(),\n                success: true,\n            });\n        } else {\n            // No response from this node's shard\n            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n                body: serde_json::json!({}),\n                success: false,\n            });\n            failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id as u32);\n            any_degraded = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok((shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/:index/search - Search documents.\nasync fn search(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    req: Json<SearchRequest>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n\n    // Build request body for nodes\n    let req_body = serde_json::to_vec(&req.0).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let offset = req.offset.unwrap_or(0);\n    let limit = req.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n    let client_requested_score = req.show_ranking_score.unwrap_or(false);\n    let facets = req.facets.clone();\n\n    // Try the primary group first\n    let primary_group_id = query_group(query_seq, state.config.replication_groups);\n    let (mut shard_responses, mut any_degraded, failed_shard_ids) = search_with_group(\n        &state,\n        &topology,\n        primary_group_id,\n        &index,\n        &req_body,\n        query_seq,\n        limit,\n        offset,\n        client_requested_score,\n        facets,\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    // If we have failed shards and there are other replica groups, try group fallback\n    if !failed_shard_ids.is_empty() && state.config.replica_groups > 1 {\n        let replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups;\n        let mut fallback_attempts = 0;\n        const MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS: u32 = 2; // Limit fallback attempts to avoid cascading\n\n        // Try other groups for the failed shards\n        for fallback_offset in 1..replica_groups as u64 {\n            if fallback_attempts >= MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS {\n                break;\n            }\n\n            let fallback_group_id = (primary_group_id as u64 + fallback_offset) % replica_groups as u64;\n            if fallback_group_id == primary_group_id as u64 {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            // Try the fallback group for all failed shards\n            let (fallback_responses, fallback_degraded, fallback_failed) = search_with_group(\n                &state,\n                &topology,\n                fallback_group_id as u32,\n                &index,\n                &req_body,\n                query_seq,\n                limit,\n                offset,\n                client_requested_score,\n                facets.clone(),\n            )\n            .await?;\n\n            // Merge the successful responses from fallback into our main responses\n            for (i, shard_resp) in shard_responses.iter_mut().enumerate() {\n                let shard_id = i as u32;\n                if !shard_resp.success && failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    // Try to find a successful response from fallback\n                    if let Some(fallback_resp) = fallback_responses.iter().find(|r| r.shard_id == shard_id && r.success) {\n                        shard_resp.body = fallback_resp.body.clone();\n                        shard_resp.success = true;\n                        // Remove from failed list\n                        failed_shard_ids.retain(|&id| id != shard_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            if fallback_degraded {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            }\n\n            // Update failed_shard_ids with any new failures from fallback\n            for &shard_id in &fallback_failed {\n                if !failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id);\n                }\n            }\n\n            fallback_attempts += 1;\n\n            // If we've recovered all failed shards, stop trying fallbacks\n            if failed_shard_ids.is_empty() {\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check if we failed completely\n    let successful_count = shard_responses.iter().filter(|s| s.success).count();\n    if successful_count == 0 {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"All shards failed\"));\n    }\n\n    // Merge results\n    let merger = MergerImpl;\n    let merged: MergedResult = merger\n        .merge(shard_responses, offset, limit, client_requested_score)\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if any shards failed (degraded mode)\n    let degraded = any_degraded || merged.degraded;\n\n    // Build response\n    let search_response = SearchResponse {\n        hits: merged.hits,\n        query: req.q.unwrap_or_default(),\n        limit,\n        offset,\n        estimated_total_hits: merged.total_hits,\n        processing_time_ms: merged.processing_time_ms,\n        facet_distribution: if merged.facets.as_object().map_or(false, |o| !o.is_empty()) {\n            Some(merged.facets)\n        } else {\n            None\n        },\n        ranking_score_threshold: req.ranking_score_threshold,\n    };\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(200);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any shard failed\n    if degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder\n        .body(Json(search_response).into_response().into_body())\n        .unwrap())\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_search_request_deserialization() {\n assert_eq!(req.show_ranking_score, Some(true));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_search_request_defaults() {\n        let json = r#\"{\"q\": \"test\"}\"#;\n\n        let req: SearchRequest = each document and group by shard\n54\t    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n55\t\n56\t    for mut doc in body {\n57\t        let docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(doc);\n70\t    }\n71\t\n72\t    // For each shard, scatter write to all RG × RF nodes\n73\t    let mut all_responses: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n74\t         (*state.client).clone(),\n96\t            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n97\t            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n98\t        );\n99\t        let result = scatter\n100\t            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n101\t            .await\n102\t            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n103\t\n104\t        // Check quorum per replica group\n105\t        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n106\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n107\t\n108\t        // Group responses by replica group\n109\t        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n110\t        for resp in &result.responses {\n111\t            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n112\t            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n113\t        }\n114\t\n115\t        // Check if each group met quorum\n116\t        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n117\t            if *count < quorum {\n118\t                any_degraded = true;\n119\t            } else {\n120\t                any_success = true;\n121\t Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n135\t    }\n136\t\n137\t    // Build response with proper task UID\n138\t    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n139\t    let response_body = \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n145\t    });\n146\t\n147\t    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n148\t\n149\t    // Add degraded header if any group was }\n155\t\n156\t    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n157\t}\n158\t\n159\t/// PUT /:index/documents - Update documents.\n160\tasync fn update_documents(\n161\t ScatterRequest {\n372\t        method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n373\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/{}\", index, id),\n374\t        body: vec![],\n375\t        headers: vec![],\n376\t {\n403\t    // Check for primary key in query string/header\n404\t    // For now, default to \"id\"\n405\t    // In production, we'd query the index settings\n406\t    if let Some(pk) = headers.get(\"X-Meiroil-Primary-Key\") {\n407\t        pk.to_str().ok().map(|s| s.to_string())\n408\t    } else {\n409\t        Some(\"id\".to_string())\n410\t    }\n411\t}\n412\t\n413\t#[cfg(test)]\n414\tmod tests {\n415\t    use super::*;\n416\t\n417\t    #[test]\n418\t    fn test_get_primary_key_default() {\n419\t        let headers = Document routes: POST, PUT, DELETE, GET /documents\n//!\n//! Implements the write path per plan §2:\n//! - Hash primary key to get shard ID\n//! - Inject _miroir_shard field\n//! - Fan out to RG × RF nodes\n//! - Per-group quorum (floor(RF/2)+1)\n//! - X-Miroir-Degraded header on any group missing quorum\n//! - 503 miroir_no_quorum only when no group met quorum\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::{HeaderMap, HeaderValue, StatusCode},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::{shard_for_key, write_targets},\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Documents router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::put(update_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::get(get_document))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document))\n}\n\n/// POST /:index/documents - Add or replace documents.\nasync fn add_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    body: Vec<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Get primary key for the index (for now, assume it's in the document or use default)\n    // In production, we'd query the index settings to get the primary key field\n    let primary_key = get_primary_key(&body, &headers).unwrap_or_else(|| \"id\".to_string());\n\n    // Inject _miroir_shard into each document and group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for mut doc in body {\n        let pk_value = doc\n            .get(primary_key)\n            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Missing primary key field '{primary_key}'\")))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, state.config.shards);\n\n        // Inject _miroir_shard field\n        if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object_mut() {\n            obj.insert(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string(), Value::Number(shard_id.into()));\n        }\n\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(doc);\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter write to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut all_responses: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, docs) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        // Build request body\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&docs).unwrap_or_default();\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents\", index),\n            body: body_bytes,\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n            (*state.client).clone(),\n            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n        );\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n        // Check quorum per replica group\n        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n        // Group responses by replica group\n        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n        for resp in &result.responses {\n            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n        }\n\n        // Check if each group met quorum\n        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n            if *count < quorum {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            } else {\n                any_success = true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Merge responses\n        for resp in result.responses {\n            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                all_responses.push(json);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If no group met quorum, return 503\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n    }\n\n    // Build response with proper task UID\n    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentAdditionOrUpdate\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any group was degraded\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// PUT /:index/documents - Update documents.\nasync fn update_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    body: Vec<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Same logic as POST, just different type\n    add_documents(State(state), Path(index), headers, body).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /:index/documents - Delete documents by batch.\nasync fn delete_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Extract filter or IDs from request body\n    let ids = body\n        .get(\"ids\")\n        .and_then(|v| v.as_array())\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Missing 'ids' field in delete request\"))?;\n\n    // Group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for id_val in ids {\n        let id = id_val\n            .as_str()\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"ID must be a string\"))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, state.config.shards);\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.to_string());\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter delete to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, ids) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"ids\": ids })).unwrap_or_default();\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/delete\", index),\n            body: body_bytes,\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n            (*state.client).clone(),\n            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n        );\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n        // Check quorum per replica group\n        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n        for resp in &result.responses {\n            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n        }\n\n        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n            if *count < quorum {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            } else {\n                any_success = true;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n    }\n\n    let task_uid = 1;\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// DELETE /:index/documents/:id - Delete a single document.\nasync fn delete_document(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let shard_id = shard_for_key(&id, state.config.shards);\n    let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n    }\n\n    let body_bytes =\n        serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"ids\": [id] })).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/delete\", index),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n    for resp in &result.responses {\n        let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n        *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n    }\n\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n        if *count < quorum {\n            any_degraded = true;\n        } else {\n            any_success = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n    }\n\n    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// GET /:index/documents/:id - Get a single document by ID.\nasync fn get_document(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // For GET, we only need to query one replica group\n    // Use the query group (round-robin)\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n    let group_id = miroir_core::router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n\n state.config.shards);\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n\n    // Build covering set for this shard\n    let covering = miroir_core::router::covering_set(1, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    // Query the node responsible for this shard\n    let target = covering\n        .first()\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes in covering set\"))?;\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/{}\", index, id),\n        body: vec![],\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    if result.responses.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::document_not_found(&id));\n    }\n\n    let resp = &result.responses[0];\n\n    // Parse response body as JSON and strip _miroir_shard\n    let mut body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n        .unwrap_or_else(|_| serde_json::json!({}));\n    if let Some(obj) = body.as_object_mut() {\n        obj.remove(\"_miroir_shard\");\n    }\n\n    let status = StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::OK);\n    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// Extract the primary key field from documents or headers.\nfn }\n139\t                }\n140\t                Err(_) => {\n141\t                    failed_nodes += 1;\n142\t                }\n143\t            }\n144\t        }\n145\t    }\n146\t\n147\t    //         filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n153\t                .into_iter()\n154\t                .filter(|t| index_uids.contains(&t.index_uid))\n155\t                .collect();\n156\t        }\n157\t .or_insert_with(Vec::new)\n184\t            .push(task);\n185\t    }\n186\t\n187\t    // Convert to aggregated tasks\n188\t    let mut results: Vec<AggregatedTask> = aggregated\n189\t Tasks routes: GET /tasks, GET /tasks/:uid, DELETE /tasks/:uid\n//!\n//! Implements task status aggregation per plan §3:\n//! - Per-task ID reconciliation across nodes\n//! - Aggregated status from all nodes\n//! - Task deletion support\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, Query, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Tasks router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(list_tasks))\n        .route(\"/:uid\", axum::routing::get(get_task).delete(delete_task))\n}\n\n/// Query parameters for tasks list.\n#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct TasksQuery {\n    #[serde(default)]\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    from: Option<u32>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    index_uid: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    statuses: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    types: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    canceled_by: Option<u32>,\n}\n\n/// Task response from a single node.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct NodeTask {\n    task_uid: u64,\n    index_uid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    task_type: String,\n    enqueued_at: String,\n    started_at: Option<String>,\n    finished_at: Option<String>,\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    details: Option<Value>,\n    duration: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated task response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct AggregatedTask {\n    task_uid: u64,\n    index_uid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    task_type: String,\n    enqueued_at: String,\n    started_at: Option<String>,\n    finished_at: Option<String>,\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    details: Option<Value>,\n    duration: Option<String>,\n    // Miroir-specific fields\n    node_count: u32,\n    nodes_completed: u32,\n    nodes_failed: u32,\n}\n\n/// Tasks list response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct TasksListResponse {\n    results: Vec<AggregatedTask>,\n    limit: usize,\n    from: Option<u32>,\n    total: u32,\n}\n\n/// GET /tasks - List all tasks with optional filters.\nasync fn list_tasks(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Query(query): Query<TasksQuery>,\n) -> Result<Json<TasksListResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let limit = query.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n    let from = query.from;\n\n    // Query all nodes for tasks\n    let mut all_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_nodes = 0;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: \"/tasks\".to_string(),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            match scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                Ok(result) => {\n                    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                        if resp.status == 200 {\n                            if let Some(results) = resp.body.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n                                for task_value in results {\n                                    if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(task_value.clone()) {\n                                        all_tasks.push(task);\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n                Err(_) => {\n                    failed_nodes += 1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Apply filters if provided\n    let mut filtered_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = all_tasks;\n\n    if let Some(index_uids) = &query.index_uid {\n        if !index_uids.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| index_uids.contains(&t.index_uid))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    if let Some(statuses) = &query.statuses {\n        if !statuses.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| statuses.contains(&t.status))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    if let Some(types) = &query.types {\n        if !types.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| types.contains(&t.task_type))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Aggregate tasks by UID\n    let mut aggregated: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<NodeTask>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for task in filtered_tasks {\n        aggregated\n            .entry(task.task_uid as u32)\n            .or_insert_with(Vec::new)\n            .push(task);\n    }\n\n    // Convert to aggregated tasks\n    let mut results: Vec<AggregatedTask> = aggregated\n        .into_iter()\n        .map(|(uid, tasks)| {\n            let first = tasks.first().unwrap();\n\n            // Determine overall status\n            let status = if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n                \"failed\".to_string()\n            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n                \"processing\".to_string()\n            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n                \"enqueued\".to_string()\n            } else {\n                \"succeeded\".to_string()\n            };\n\n            let nodes_completed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n            let nodes_failed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"failed\").count() as u32;\n\n            AggregatedTask {\n                task_uid: uid as u64,\n                index_uid: first.index_uid.clone(),\n                status,\n                task_type: first.task_type.clone(),\n                enqueued_at: first.enqueued_at.clone(),\n                started_at: first.started_at.clone(),\n                finished_at: first.finished_at.clone(),\n                error: first.error.clone(),\n                details: first.details.clone(),\n                duration: first.duration.clone(),\n                node_count: tasks.len() as u32,\n                nodes_completed,\n                nodes_failed,\n            }\n        })\n        .collect();\n\n    // Sort by task UID descending\n    results.sort_by(|a, b| b.task_uid.cmp(&a.task_uid));\n\n    // Apply from/limit pagination\n    let total = results.len() as u32;\n    if let Some(from_uid) = from {\n        results = results.into_iter().filter(|t| t.task_uid <= from_uid as u64).collect();\n    }\n    results.truncate(limit);\n\n    Ok(Json(TasksListResponse {\n        results,\n        limit,\n        from,\n        total,\n    }))\n}\n\n/// GET /tasks/:uid - Get a specific task.\nasync fn get_task(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Parse task UID\n    let task_uid = uid\n        .parse::<u64>()\n        .map_err(|_| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Invalid task UID\"))?;\n\n    // Query all nodes for this task\n    let mut node_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n    let mut not_found = true;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/tasks/{}\", task_uid),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        not_found = false;\n                        if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(resp.body.clone()) {\n                            node_tasks.push(task);\n                        }\n                    } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                        // Task not found on this node\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    if not_found {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Task {} not found\", uid)));\n    }\n\n    if node_tasks.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Task {} not found\", uid)));\n    }\n\n    // Aggregate task status\n    let first = node_tasks.first().unwrap();\n    let status = if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n        \"failed\".to_string()\n    } else if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n        \"processing\".to_string()\n    } else if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n        \"enqueued\".to_string()\n    } else {\n        \"succeeded\".to_string()\n    };\n\n    let nodes_completed = node_tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n    let nodes_failed = node_tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"failed\").count() as u32;\n\n    let aggregated = AggregatedTask {\n        task_uid: first.task_uid,\n        index_uid: first.index_uid.clone(),\n        status,\n        task_type: first.task_type.clone(),\n        enqueued_at: first.enqueued_at.clone(),\n        started_at: first.started_at.clone(),\n        finished_at: first.finished_at.clone(),\n        error: first.error.clone(),\n        details: first.details.clone(),\n        duration: first.duration.clone(),\n        node_count: node_tasks.len() as u32,\n        nodes_completed,\n        nodes_failed,\n    };\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::OK, Json(aggregated)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// DELETE /tasks/:uid - Cancel/delete a task.\nasync fn delete_task(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Parse task UID\n    let task_uid = uid\n        .parse::<u64>()\n        .map_err(|_| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Invalid task UID\"))?;\n\n    // Broadcast delete to all nodes\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/tasks/{}\", task_uid),\n        body: vec![],\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n        let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n        return Ok((status, Json(resp.body.clone())).into_response());\n    }\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(serde_json::json!({}))).into_response())\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_tasks_query_deserialization() {\n        let query_str = \"limit=10&from=100&indexUid=test&statuses=succeeded&types=documentAddition\";\n\n        let query: TasksQuery = serde_qs::from_str(query_str).unwrap();\n\n        assert_eq!(query.limit, Some(10));\n        assert_eq!(query.from, Some(100));\n        assert_eq!(query.index_uid, Some(vec![\"test\".to_string()]));\n        assert_eq!(query.statuses, Some(vec![\"succeeded\".to_string()]));\n        assert_eq!(query.types, Some(vec![\"documentAddition\".to_string()]));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_aggregated_task_status_determination() {\n        // When any task fails, overall status is failed\n        let tasks_with_failure = vec![\n            NodeTask {\n                task_uid: 1,\n                index_uid: \"test\".to_string(),\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                task_type: \"documentAddition\".to_string(),\n                enqueued_at: \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\".to_string(),\n                started_at: None,\n                finished_at: None,\n                error: None,\n                details: None,\n                duration: None,\n            },\n            NodeTask {\n                task_uid: 1,\n                index_uid: \"test\".to_string(),\n                status: \"failed\".to_string(),\n                task_type: \"documentAddition\".to_string(),\n                enqueued_at: \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\".to_string(),\n                started_at: None,\n                finished_at: None,\n                error: None,\n                details: None,\n                duration: None,\n            },\n        ];\n\n        let has_failed = tasks_with_failure.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\");\n get_all_settings(\n77\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n78\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n79\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n80\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n81\t\n82\t    // Query first available node\n83\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n84\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n85\t            let request scatter\n95\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n96\t                .await\n97\t                .map_err(|e| Ok(Json(resp.body.clone()));\n102\t                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n103\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n104\t                }\n105\t original value to restore on rollback.\n115\t    original_value: Option<Value>,\n116\t    /// Whether the setting existed before.\n117\t    existed: bool,\n118\t}\n119\t\n120\t/// Generic handler for updating a setting with rollback.\n121\tasync fn update_setting_with_rollback(\n122\t    state: &ProxyState,\n123\t    index: &str,\n124\t    setting_path: &str,\n125\t    value: &Value,\n126\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n127\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n128\t    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n129\t\n130\t    if targets.is_empty() {\n131\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n132\t    }\n133\t\n134\t    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n135\t    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n136\t\n137\t    for target in &targets {\n138\t        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n139\t            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n140\t            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n141\t            body: vec![],\n142\t            headers: vec![],\n143\t        };\n144\t\n145\t        let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n146\t\n147\t        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n148\t            Ok(resp) => {\n149\t                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n150\t                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n151\t                        Some(r.body.clone())\n152\t                    } else {\n153\t                        None\n154\t                    };\n155\t                    rollback_values.insert(\n156\t                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n157\t                        RollbackValue {\n158\t                            original_value,\n159\t                            existed: r.status == 200,\n160\t                        },\n161\t                    );\n162\t                }\n163\t            }\n164\t            Err(_) => {\n165\t                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n166\t                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n167\t                    original_value: None,\n168\t                    existed: false,\n169\t                });\n170\t            }\n171\t        }\n172\t    }\n173\t\n174\t    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n175\t\n176\t    let vec![],\n181\t    };\n182\t\n183\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n184\t\n185\t    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n186\t    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n187\t    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n188\t\n189\t    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n190\t    for target in &targets {\n191\t        let result = scatter\n192\t            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n193\t            .await;\n194\t\n195\t        match result {\n196\t            Ok(resp) => {\n197\t                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n198\t                    if (200..300).contains(&r.status) {\n199\t                        successful_nodes.push(target.as_str().to_string());\n200\t                        last_response = Some(r.body.clone());\n201\t                    } else {\n202\t                        // Rollback from successful nodes\n203\t                        rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n204\t                        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n205\t                            \"Failed to update setting on node {}: status {}\",\n206\t                            target.as_str(),\n207\t                            r.status\n208\t                        )));\n209\t                    }\n210\t                }\n211\t            }\n212\t            Err(e) => {\n213\t                // Rollback from successful nodes\n214\t                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n215\t                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n216\t                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n217\t                    target.as_str(),\n218\t                    e\n219\t                )));\n220\t            }\n221\t        }\n222\t    }\n223\t\n224\t    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n225\t        body\n226\t    } else {\n227\t        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n228\t        serde_json::json!({\n229\t            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n230\t            \"indexUid\": index,\n231\t            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n232\t            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n233\t            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n234\t        })\n235\t    };\n236\t\n237\t    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n238\t}\n239\t\n240\t/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\n241\tasync fn rollback_setting(\n242\t    state: &ProxyState,\n243\t    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n244\t    successful_nodes: &[String],\n245\t    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n246\t    index: &str,\n247\t    setting_path: &str,\n248\t) {\n249\t    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n250\t        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n251\t            if rollback.existed {\n252\t                // Restore original value\n253\t                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n254\t                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n255\t                    let _ = state\n256\t                        .client\n257\t                        .send_to_node(\n258\t                            topology,\n259\t                            &node_id.as_str().into(),\n260\t                            \"PUT\",\n261\t                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n262\t                            Some(&body_bytes),\n263\t                            &[],\n264\t                        )\n265\t                        .await;\n266\t                }\n267\t            } else {\n268\t                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n269\t                let _ = state\n270\t                    .client\n271\t                    .send_to_node(\n272\t                        topology,\n273\t                        &node_id.as_str().into(),\n274\t                        \"DELETE\",\n275\t                        &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n276\t                        None,\n277\t                        &[],\n278\t                    )\n279\t                    .await;\n280\t              return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index));\n598\t                }\n599\t            }\n600\t        }\n601\t    }\n602\t\n603\t       let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n634\t        return Ok((status, Json(resp.body.clone())).into_response());\n635\t    }\n636\t\n637\t    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(serde_json::json!({}))).into_response())\n638\t}\n639\t\n640\t#[cfg(test)]\n641\tmod tests {\n642\t\n643\t    #[test]\n644\t    fn Settings routes: GET, PATCH, DELETE /indexes/:index/settings\n//!\n//! Implements settings broadcast per plan §3:\n//! - Sequential apply-with-rollback on failure\n//! - Broadcast to all nodes\n//! - Rollback from successful nodes if any fail\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Settings router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(get_all_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/filterable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_filterable_attributes).put(update_filterable_attributes).delete(delete_filterable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/searchable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_searchable_attributes).put(update_searchable_attributes).delete(delete_searchable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/sortable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_sortable_attributes).put(update_sortable_attributes).delete(delete_sortable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/displayed-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_displayed_attributes).put(update_displayed_attributes).delete(delete_displayed_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/ranking-rules\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_ranking_rules).put(update_ranking_rules).delete(delete_ranking_rules),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/stop-words\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_stop_words).put(update_stop_words).delete(delete_stop_words),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/synonyms\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_synonyms).put(update_synonyms).delete(delete_synonyms),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/distinct-attribute\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_distinct_attribute).put(update_distinct_attribute).delete(delete_distinct_attribute),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/typo-tolerance\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_typo_tolerance).put(update_typo_tolerance).delete(delete_typo_tolerance),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/faceting\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_faceting).put(update_faceting).delete(delete_faceting),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/pagination\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_pagination).put(update_pagination).delete(delete_pagination),\n        )\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get all settings.\nasync fn get_all_settings(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query first available node\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if resp.status == 200 {\n                    return Ok(Json(resp.body.clone()));\n                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n}\n\n/// Cached original value for rollback.\nstruct RollbackValue {\n    /// The original value to restore on rollback.\n    original_value: Option<Value>,\n    /// Whether the setting existed before.\n    existed: bool,\n}\n\n/// Generic handler for updating a setting with rollback.\nasync fn update_setting_with_rollback(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n    value: &Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for target in &targets {\n        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n            body: vec![],\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n                        Some(r.body.clone())\n                    } else {\n                        None\n                    };\n                    rollback_values.insert(\n                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n                        RollbackValue {\n                            original_value,\n                            existed: r.status == 200,\n                        },\n                    );\n                }\n            }\n            Err(_) => {\n                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n                    original_value: None,\n                    existed: false,\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n\n    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n    for target in &targets {\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n            .await;\n\n        match result {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    if (200..300).contains(&r.status) {\n                        successful_nodes.push(target.as_str().to_string());\n                        last_response = Some(r.body.clone());\n                    } else {\n                        // Rollback from successful nodes\n                        rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                            \"Failed to update setting on node {}: status {}\",\n                            target.as_str(),\n                            r.status\n                        )));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                // Rollback from successful nodes\n                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n                    target.as_str(),\n                    e\n                )));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n        body\n    } else {\n        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n        serde_json::json!({\n            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n            \"indexUid\": index,\n            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n        })\n    };\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\nasync fn rollback_setting(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    successful_nodes: &[String],\n    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n) {\n    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n            if rollback.existed {\n                // Restore original value\n                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n                    let _ = state\n                        .client\n                        .send_to_node(\n                            topology,\n                            &node_id.as_str().into(),\n                            \"PUT\",\n                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                            Some(&body_bytes),\n                            &[],\n                        )\n                        .await;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n                let _ = state\n                    .client\n                    .send_to_node(\n                        topology,\n                        &node_id.as_str().into(),\n                        \"DELETE\",\n                        &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                        None,\n                        &[],\n                    )\n                    .await;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn get_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    get_setting(state, &index, \"filterable-attributes\").await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn update_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is always in filterable attributes\n    let mut updated = body.clone();\n    if let Some(arr) = updated.as_array_mut() {\n        if !arr.iter().any(|v| v.as_str() == Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n            arr.push(serde_json::json!(\"_miroir_shard\"));\n        }\n    }\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &updated).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn delete_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Reset to default but always include _miroir_shard\n    let default = serde_json::json!([\"_miroir_shard\"]);\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &default).await\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/searchable-attributes\nasync fn get_searchable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    get_setting(state, &index, \"settings/searchable-attributes\").await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/searchable-attributes\nasync fn update_searchable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/searchable-attributes\", &body).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/searchable-attributes\nasync fn delete_searchable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    delete_setting(state, &index, \"settings/searchable-attributes\").await\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/sortable-attributes\nasync fn get_sortable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n &body).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/sortable-attributes\nasync fn delete_sortable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> delete_pagination(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    delete_setting(state, &index, \"settings/pagination\").await\n}\n\n/// Generic GET handler for a setting.\nasync fn get_setting(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE\n        } else if self.code.contains(\"not_found\") {\n            StatusCode::NOT_FOUND\n        } else {\n            StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST\n        };\n\n
